title: Norwegian Rye Fritters
description: These earthy Norwegian rye fritters are a delicious and satisfying snack, perfect for a hangover cure or a quick energy boost. They feature rye as the main ingredient and are fried to a crispy golden brown.

ingredients.name: vegetable oil
ingredients.amount: 2 inches deep in a frying pan

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the rye flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk until well combined.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a thick batter forms.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop the batter into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy.
